clusters.justification: These terms consistently co-activate within cortical-subcortical circuitry, representing the overarching macro-domain of generating, experiencing, and regulating subjective emotional states.
These terms share neuroimaging activation patterns in the mesocorticolimbic pathways, reflecting the broad functional axis of assessing stimulus worth to drive motivated behavior and choice.
These terms are hallmark expressions of the default mode network's role in internally directed mentation, specifically representing the macro-function of modeling the self and the minds of others.
